source_pr.title: util: make rowContainer can spill again after calling reset.
source_pr.body:

### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: close https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/issues/18523 <!-- REMOVE this line if no issue to close -->

Problem Summary: The reseted rowContainer can't spill again and make the test unstable.

### What is changed and how it works?

Proposal: [xxx](url) <!-- REMOVE this line if not applicable -->

What's Changed: 
1. Reset the spill action when resetting rowContainer.
2. Add more ut.

How it Works:

### Related changes

- Need to cherry-pick to the release branch

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- Integration test


Side effects

- Performance regression
    - Consumes more CPU
    - Consumes more MEM
- Breaking backward compatibility

### Release note <!-- bugfixes or new feature need a release note -->

- <!-- Please write a release note here to describe the change you made when it is released to the users of TiDB. If your PR doesn't involve any change to TiDB(like test enhancements, RFC proposals...), you can write `No release note`. -->

symptoms: PR title: make rowContainer can spill again after calling reset.
failure_signature: PR title: make rowContainer can spill again after calling reset.
root_cause_explanation: `RowContainer.Reset()` did not reset the internal spill-to-disk action state (`actionSpill`). After a reset, the container could no longer spill again, so tests that relied on spilling behavior could become unstable (depending on memory usage and whether spilling was expected to happen). This PR stabilizes behavior by adding `SpillDiskAction.Reset()` (reset status + sync.Once) and calling it from `RowContainer.Reset()`, making subsequent spills work deterministically after reset.
fix_pattern: Reset internal spill action state when resetting `RowContainer` so spill-to-disk can be triggered again deterministically after `Reset()`.

evidence: evidence: PR title: make rowContainer can spill again after calling reset.
evidence: fixes row container state reset so spill-to-disk actions can run deterministically across resets; updates tests accordingly (util/chunk/row_container.go, util/chunk/row_container_test.go).
